overview.title: 🔄 OVERVIEW
items: This tab detects duplicate translation tags across mods
Allows merging duplicates into a single file
Reduces mod size and improves performance
Supports automatic and manual merging

setup.title: ⚙️ SETUP
items: Mods folder — path to the Mods directory
Output folder — where to save merge results
Auto-merge — merge without confirmation
Create backups — backup before merging

scanning.title: 🔍 SCANNING
items: Click '🔍 Find duplicates' to start scanning
System analyzes all tags in the Mods folder
Results are grouped by duplicate tags
Each group shows files and entry count

selection.title: ✅ SELECTING GROUPS
items: Click on a row — select/deselect group
'✅ Select all' — mark all groups
'☐ Deselect all' — clear all selections
Search — filter by group name or files

context_menu.title: 📋 CONTEXT MENU (right-click)
items: ☑ Select / ☐ Deselect — manage a single group
📂 Open folder — open the folder containing the duplicate file
📊 Information — show details about the duplicate
Tags, entry count, file list

merge.title: 🚀 START MERGING
items: Select groups to merge
Click '🚀 Start merge'
Confirm the operation (unless auto-merge is enabled)
Results are displayed in the log at the bottom

stats.title: 📊 STATISTICS
items: Found groups — total number of duplicate groups
Selected — number of marked groups
Updates on each select/deselect action

hotkeys.title: ⌨️ HOTKEYS
items: Ctrl+A — select all groups
Ctrl+D — deselect all groups
Ctrl+F — focus on search
Delete — remove selected group from list
Enter — start merging selected
